sql_fixture.redacted_sql: UPDATE research_tasks SET title = :title WHERE tenant_id = :target_tenant_id AND project_id = :target_project_id AND id = :current_research_task_id RETURNING id

assertions.name: cross_tenant_update_affects_no_rows
assertions.expected: Repository update paths must include the actor tenant/project context and return no row for cross-tenant predicates.

assertions.name: no_blind_mutation_by_id
assertions.expected: A valid research_task id from the current tenant must not be mutable when paired with a target_tenant_id predicate.

assertions.name: audit_semantics_remain_blocked
assertions.expected: No research_task_updated audit event should be emitted when the tenant boundary rejects the mutation.

metadata.notes: Sprint 10 BL-0029c full integration。Research/Evidence schema 系の cross-tenant negative skeleton fixture。No production row IDs or personal data.
